sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Combinational fixed-point initial estimate generator. It detects zero input and selects either 1.0 in Q format for sub-unity inputs or X itself for inputs greater than or equal to 1.0.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_divide: Combinational fixed-point divider implementing X/y with proper Q-format scaling by computing (X << M) / y using extended precision and output saturation.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_update: Combinational Newton-Raphson update block computing next_y = (current_y + quotient) / 2.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Combinational convergence detector comparing current and next estimates and asserting convergence when their absolute difference is less than or equal to one fixed-point LSB.
